'''Najarkan wilderbeasts''' were large [[Snake/Legends|snakes]] native to the [[Forest/Legends|rain forests]] of [[Najarka]]. They could grow to over thirty [[Meter/Legends|meters]] long, with mouths over two meters in diameter with which they could swallow [[Human/Legends|Humans]] whole. Their dull [[Color/Legends|red]] [[Eye/Legends|eyes]] were low-resolution photoreceptors adapted to detect their favored prey, the black-and-white [[kichicolia]]s. Najarkan wilderbeasts could not tell the difference between kichicolias and [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]].
